echo.Chinese:
用法：echo [选项] [字符串/变量...]
功能：输出文本或变量值（Windows/Linux语法一致）
核心选项：-n（不输出换行）、-e（启用转义字符，支持\n换行、\t制表符等）
示例：
  echo "Hello Onyx" - 输出字符串
  echo -e "Line1\nLine2" - 多行输出
  echo $PATH - 输出环境变量
适配系统：Windows/Linux/Termux全兼容
echo.English:
Usage: echo [option] [string/var...]
Function: Display a line of text (consistent syntax on Windows/Linux)
Core options: -n (no trailing newline), -e (enable escape sequences, support \n line break, \t tab, etc.)
Examples:
  echo "Hello Onyx" - Output string
  echo -e "Line1\nLine2" - Multi-line output
  echo $PATH - Output environment variable
Compatible systems: Windows/Linux/Termux
